gt_sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id ORDER BY T1.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT u.DisplayName
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE p.FavoriteCount IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.FavoriteCount DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the display name of the user who is the owner of the most valuable post?
